articles.summary: 针对LLM智能体在真实噪声环境下性能退化的问题，提出通过噪声环境训练增强鲁棒性的方法。核心思路是在训练中引入随机性和不完美因素，使智能体学会应对环境噪声，从而提升部署时的稳定性和泛化能力。

articles.summary: 发现智能体强化学习训练会导致冗余工具调用和知识边界模糊，提出在线策略内在知识边界增强方法。该方法通过强化学习机制帮助模型区分何时需要调用工具、何时依赖自身参数知识，从而减少冗余并提升效率。

articles.title: The MiniMax-M2 Series: Mini Activations Unleashing Max Real-World Intelligence
articles.excerpt: We introduce the MiniMax-M2 series, a family of Mixture-of-Experts language models built around the principle that mini activations can unleash maximum real-world intelligence. The flagship M2 contains 229.9B total parameters with only 9.8B activated per token. Designed end-to-end for agentic deployment, the M2 series rests on three components: (i) agent-driven data pipelines producing large-scale
articles.summary: 提出MiniMax-M2系列MoE语言模型，旗舰版总参数229.9B，每token仅激活9.8B参数。采用智能体驱动数据管道、高效训练和推理优化三大组件，端到端设计面向智能体部署，在保持低成本的同时实现强智能。

articles.title: Beyond Final Answers: Auditing Trajectory-Level Hallucinations in Multi-Agent Industrial Workflows

Yet most hallucination benchmarks still evaluate only the final output, missing failures that originate in intermediate Thought-Action-Observation steps. We present Trajel, a dataset and evaluation framework for auditing trajectory-level hallucinations in multi-agent ind
articles.summary: 提出Trajel数据集与评估框架，用于审计多智能体工业工作流中轨迹级别的幻觉（中间思考-行动-观察步骤）。传统基准仅评估最终输出，该工作填补了面向过程幻觉检测的空白，提升多智能体系统可靠性。

articles.title: Scaling World-Model Reinforcement Learning Through Diffusion Policy Optimization
articles.excerpt: Model-based reinforcement learning (RL) can be effectively supported at scale through the use of world models. However, in practice, scaling such approaches remains fundamentally limited. A commonly recognized challenge is model bias and error compounding, which degrade long-horizon predictions. Beyond these issues, we identify a more critical yet underexplored bottleneck: a structural misalignmen
articles.summary: 识别基于世界模型的强化学习扩展瓶颈：结构不对齐。提出扩散策略优化方法，通过对齐策略与世界模型预测分布，缓解模型偏差和误差累积问题，实现更稳定的长程预测和大规模RL训练。

articles.summary: 提出奖励倾斜分布匹配蒸馏（RTDMD）两阶段框架，融合分布匹配蒸馏与奖励引导强化学习，用于少步流生成器与人类偏好对齐。实验表明该方法能有效提升少步扩散模型的图像生成质量和偏好符合度。
